_comments.port: Port the agent listens on — must match API setting print_agent_url
_comments.receiptPrinter: Exact Windows printer name for customer receipts
_comments.kitchenPrinter: Exact Windows printer name for kitchen tickets
_comments.paperWidthMm: Paper roll width in mm — 80 or 58
_comments.logoPath: Absolute path to logo image (PNG/JPG). Leave empty for no logo.
